description: A customer wants to refinance their existing auto loan from another lender to get a lower interest rate.

nodes.task_description: Gather details of the existing loan (lender, payoff amount) and the customer's information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary information for the refinance application.

nodes.task_description: Run a credit check and provide a refinance offer, including a new, lower interest rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets approval and offers the customer a new loan that lowers their monthly payment.

nodes.task_description: If accepted, process the new loan and send the payoff check to the previous lender.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the new loan and issues payment to the other bank to pay off the old loan.
